brief.title: Pre-Mission Brief
briefParagraphs: I got you a window. Not a breach, not control. Just fragile temporary access to one executive desktop, and every second is borrowed time.

Your job: prove that Project OMNI exists. The evidence is buried across departments, scattered in forms that were never meant to connect. Find those fragments and turn them into a pattern MegaCorp can no longer hide.
Everything you confirm goes onto the Evidence Board. By the end of this round, the picture has to stand on its own. Not suspicion. Not instinct. Proof.

Zex is watching. She won't commit to a mission built on guesswork. If OMNI has no confirmed footprint, she walks. What you assemble becomes the Footprint Dossier: compute, funding, personnel, payload, bound into one indictment, signed by Zex. That is the artifact that carries forward.
Work clean. The mirror is read-only, unstable, one wrong stretch from detection.
brief.pullquote: Find the footprint. Build the case.

dossier.label: TARGET
dossier.name: MegaCorp
dossier.role: Global conglomerate · the institution burying OMNI

steps.title: FOLLOW THE BOARD
steps.description: Progress through four locked leads in order: COMPUTE, FUNDING, PERSONNEL, PAYLOAD. Complete each lead to unlock the next.

steps.title: INVESTIGATE THE DESKTOP
steps.description: Browse the files linked to the active lead and find the anomaly hiding in the data. When you spot it, click directly on it.

steps.title: VERIFY THE INTEL
steps.description: Answer the verification question using what you've found. A correct answer locks the lead and advances the operation.

detection.title: THE DETECTION METER
detection.description: Every mistake pushes the meter up. Hit 100% and MegaCorp closes the connection.
detection.hint: Stuck? Click the lightbulb at the bottom-left of the Mission Channel to pull a targeted hint from Voss.

game.placeholderBody: React migration in progress. Reference: reference/legacy-missions/Mission 1.html — evidence board, XP desktop, verification flow.
